summary: Implement Pydantic models and shared test fixtures for benchmark analysis (Task 2)
context: Task 2 of the Python analysis package plan: define all Pydantic data models for benchmark data structures and create shared pytest fixtures for downstream test tasks.
rationale: Created models.py with all 16 Pydantic model classes matching the plan exactly (GitChurn, RunMetrics, DimensionScore, ScoredResult, ToolCall, TokenUsage, TurnUsage, SessionTiming, FileChange, SessionTranscript, CoordinationArtifacts, EnvironmentInfo, RunConfig, RunMetadata, EffectSize, ConditionSummary, DimensionAnalysis). Created conftest.py with factory functions (make_score, make_metrics, make_scored_result, make_tool_call, make_transcript) and pytest fixtures (sample_scores: 48 results across 2 scenarios x 8 conditions x 3 iterations, sample_metadata). budgetDollars typed as float per plan correction. All models import cleanly.

alternatives.reason_rejected: Plan explicitly specifies Pydantic; dataclasses lack validation and JSON parsing needed for loading benchmark output files

alternatives.option: Define models inline in each analyzer module
alternatives.reason_rejected: Would create duplication and import cycles; central models.py is the standard pattern for shared data structures
